records.ety: [Cf. OF. mesuage, masnage, LL. messuagium, mansionaticum, fr. L. mansio, -onis, a staying, remaining, dwelling, fr. manere, mansum, to stay, remain, E. mansion, manse.]

defs: A dwelling house, with the adjacent buildings and curtilage, and the adjoining lands appropriated to the use of the household.
quotes: They wedded her to sixty thousand pounds, To lands in Kent, and messuages in York.
